profile.name: Athul Sanker Neyyan
profile.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience designing and supporting secure, scalable, cloud-native backend systems using Python, JavaScript, and Java. Strong expertise in object-oriented design, SOLID principles, and distributed systems. Experienced with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and enterprise databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB). Proven contributor in Agile environments with hands-on experience supporting production deployments, documentation, and security-focused development. Actively leveraging GenAI responsibly to improve engineering efficiency while adhering to enterprise and compliance standards.

clients.name: Demonware
highlights: Working on the design and development of an end-to-end testing framework for validating Vitess cluster deployments on Kubernetes, using Python and Ansible.
Collaborated with internal teams to identify, analyze, and remediate security vulnerabilities in critical backend REST API services supporting major global game titles.
Modernized legacy service security by introducing a custom JWT token issuer for authenticated inter-service API communication.
Working within an Agile CI/CD process, participating in multi-environment deployments (scratch to production) to support minimal production downtime.
Updated, improved, and standardized API documentation using Swagger following OpenAPI specifications.
Improved microservice security by identifying, fixing and documenting vulnerabilities across services using Grafana, Elasticsearch, and Kibana.
Used Spark (PySpark) and SQL on Databricks to query and analyze large datasets from various sources.
Applied expertise in Python, MySQL, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm to support team initiatives and drive secure, scalable solutions.
Contributed to team efforts on GenAI adoption by proposing ideas, conducting investigations, and developing proof-of-concepts to improve team productivity.

clients.name: Meta
highlights: Developed and maintained features for an internal tool (equivalent to Apache Airflow) used for authoring, scheduling, and monitoring 250K+ data pipelines.
Optimized the tool's core logic to handle large DAGs by implementing a solution that splits child job execution into chunks, preventing the 5K job limit in Chronos.
Resolved serialization errors in data pipelines by fixing Thrift configurations, Jinja templates, and Python operators, ensuring consistency in pipeline code retrieval and execution.
Created a codemod script using Python and Shell to automate the modification of thousands of pipelines with libcst, enabling efficient transformation logic across large codebases.
Queried and aggregated data from data warehouse using Presto in notebook to analyze and identify areas of failure.

clients.name: RBC
highlights: Designed and developed features for a Python Django REST API service to support private cloud storage solutions for banking applications.
Utilized GitHub, Docker, Kubernetes, and Jenkins to streamline and automate code deployment and testing processes within a CI/CD pipeline.
Developed a test pipeline for end-to-end data validation in ETL processes using Python, Pandas, and SQL.
Actively participated in Agile methodologies, contributing to sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives while leveraging Jira for effective project management.
Served as an SME, providing consultation on leveraging Python for data validation, generating efficiency graphs, and automating report generation during a large-scale ETL project.

clients.name: Samsung
highlights: Contributed to the gRPC Java API team with responsibilities in feature development, performance improvement, and maintenance, enabling the API to handle millions of requests efficiently.
Built a data pipeline with Python, Pandas, and Apache Airflow for extract, transform, and load from third-party REST APIs to internal databases.
Developed a testing framework with Node.js and MySQL to evaluate and validate gRPC services.
Utilized Azure Databricks to analyze product performance from user data and provide actionable insights for improvements.
Streamlined the deployment process by automating it with GitHub Actions, Shell scripting, Jenkins, and Azure, leading to significant improvement in workflow efficiency.
Utilized Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, and Jenkins to establish a robust development process for constructing, testing, and deploying micro-services.
Restructured communication flows across departments to optimize efficiency in the Java service, fostering collaboration through Jira and Confluence.
Developed and maintained a Node.js and Express-based REST API for a decentralized social media app, integrating Auth0 for authentication to enhance security and user management.
Integrated REST APIs into a React-based frontend dashboard, enabling dynamic data visualization and user interactions.
Migrated a Python Django REST API from MySQL Database to Couchbase and Redis, resulting in substantial performance and scalability enhancements.
Built a Kafka and Python-based system to fetch, process, and update user transactions in MongoDB, seamlessly integrated with an Express.js API.
Created a Python application for extract, transform, and load data (ETL) from HTML files in S3, deployed on AWS Lambda to enable serverless data processing.
Proactively contributed to Agile methodologies, fostering team collaboration and adaptability through effective Jira utilization.
Participated in code reviews, ensured high-quality code through best practices, and utilized Git and GitLab for version control and streamlined deployments.
Designed and developed an object detection system using Python, TensorFlow, and OpenCV tailored for specialized UAVs.
Successfully integrated the custom object detection system into the special-purpose UAVs.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics and Communication Engineering
